title: Tokopedia Webscraper
description: A simple webscraper program to automatically search for a specific item and list all results in a spreadsheet

title: Simple Chatbot
description: A simple chatbot that chooses responses based on a response list and uses a message probability system to figure out what the user typed

title: Live Product Showcase with React
description: A product showcase website that pulls live data from a dummy.json link and provides functionality such as Search, Sort by Category, Sort by Price, Add to Cart, and Remove from Cart

title: Finance Tracker
description: A Finance Tracker program that runs in console that saves data locally based on input date. Provides options to Input, Delete, Edit past logs and shows balance and deposits

title: To Do List
description: A simple To Do List app to input tasks by date, shows task status, delete tasks, clear all tasks, and filter tasks by name
